engine.title: Engine
engine.description: Engine that produced this result (chatgpt, perplexity, gemini, claude).

query.title: Query
query.description: The buyer-intent query sent to the engine.

cited.title: Cited?
cited.description: Whether the domain appeared in any citation returned by the engine.

citation_rank.title: Citation Rank
citation_rank.description: 1-indexed position of the first citation matching the domain. null if not cited.

citation_url.title: Citation URL
citation_url.description: The specific URL cited (first match). null if not cited.

all_citation_urls.title: All Citations
all_citation_urls.description: All URLs from this domain that appeared in citations.

total_citations.title: Total Citations
total_citations.description: Total number of source URLs the engine returned for this query.

response_truncated.title: Truncated?
response_truncated.description: True if the engine hit the token limit.
